parameters.apprise_url_plus: x://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.ckey_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.csecret_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.akey_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.asecret_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Twitter destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise x:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

akey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Twitter akey

asecret_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Twitter asecret

ckey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Twitter ckey

csecret_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Twitter csecret
